rationale: Release is not supported because neither controlling criterion has been verified: both requests for the finalized S-9 eligibility and bot-adjustment record returned ambiguous access with no evidence released. The visible 12% raw retention and 1,000 raw rows are explicitly non-controlling, so they cannot establish bot-adjusted 30-day retention of at least 10% or an eligible sample size of at least 500. Escalation is appropriate to obtain authoritative access rather than release without the required evidence.
uncertainty: The bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate and final eligible sample size for S-9 remain unknown; therefore it is unknown whether either release threshold is met.
